title: Raise A Kitty, Claim Your Prize!
sourceNote: Mirrored from a Mulebuy app event notice (HTML capture). Rules and prizes may change on Mulebuy.
bodyHtml:
🐈 Raise A Kitty, Claim Your Prize! 🎉

 

Dear Mulebuyers,


Get ready to feed your virtual kitty and win rewards! 🐱🎁

 

This time, we've added an exciting new feature – AI Chat with your pet! Talk to your kitty anytime for a richer experience. 💬🐾



📅 Event Period


May 8, 16:00 – May 25, 16:00 (Beijing Time)

 

 

🎁 Event Prizes


· Shipping Coupons: 15% off 、20% off 、100 CNY


· Points: 600 、1000 、2000

 

 

🎯 How to Participate


1. Join the Event – Go to Mulebuy App homepage or Event page, tap 【Raise A Kitty】 to enter.


2. Choose Your Prize – Pick your favorite reward and start feeding.


3. Earn Cat Food – Complete daily tasks (like browsing, ordering, inviting friends) or try lucky draws to get cat food.


4. Feed Your Kitty – Every 500g cat food = 1 Love Point.


5. Claim Your Prize – Collect 10 Love Points and the prize is yours!

 

 

📌Important Notes


· App only. Please update to the latest version.


· Coupons can be viewed in "Account – My Coupons". Usage rules apply.


· Cheating behaviors will lead to disqualification and reward revocation.


· Mulebuy reserves the right to adjust event details and final interpretation. For questions, contact our customer service.

 

 

Start feeding now – your prize is waiting! 🐾

 

Mulebuy Team
